mapper.select: select id, username, email, password, avatar from user where id = #{id}
select id, username, email, password, avatar from user where email = #{email}
mapper.insert: insert into user (username, password, email) values (#{username}, #{password}, #{email})
mapper.select: select id, username, email, avatar from user where email like concat('%', #{q}, '%') or username like concat('%', #{q}, '%') limit 10
